packageName: Rain Bird LNK/LNK2 WiFi Module Controller
author: Marc Hedish
releaseNotes:
v0.1.3.15 - Fixed clock sync retry loop by suppressing false ±86400-second drift after opcode 11 (Set Time); Improved command support probing reliability by retrying ACK-only opcode 04XX responses; Hardened opcode 04XX command-support detection; Added dynamic runtime controller-state opcode-family inference (4C vs 3F).
v0.1.3.11 Added automatic moduleFirmwareVersion detection with status.json → opcode 03 fallback and corrected hybrid firmware attribution; Refactored firmwarVersion to controllerFirmwareVersion and adapterFirmwareVersion; Various internal bug fixes.

drivers.name: Rain Bird LNK/LNK2 WiFi Module Controller
